creator: spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua
text:
On Mon, Aug 04, 2008 at 11:11:14AM, Philippe Audéoud wrote:
> === Checking filesystem state after all packages deleted
> ================================================================
> list of extra files and directories in / (not present on clean system
> but present after everything was deinstalled)
> 46163251        4 drwxr-xr-x    3 root             wheel
> 512 Aug  3 20:51 usr/local/share/gnome
> 46163252        4 drwxr-xr-x    2 root             wheel
> 512 Aug  3 20:51 usr/local/share/gnome/help
> 
> Can you fix it please?
> Thanks!
Not my day.


Index: games/lordsawar/distinfo
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (lordsawar-0.0.9.tar.gz) = 4e072bce1fe77f61a97c67d766a64c9e
-SHA256 (lordsawar-0.0.9.tar.gz) = d87cf2c5c51dd169757020ffb679ce5f9b7b102fc792daca327c57fefa1f5fdd
-SIZE (lordsawar-0.0.9.tar.gz) = 14364630
+MD5 (lordsawar-0.1.0.tar.gz) = 8e419f25b42aa0f4fe73af9206065e56
+SHA256 (lordsawar-0.1.0.tar.gz) = fb2d19562360cfe52ea926b1dc662329fc23bdd06c901f307b3af8d59d3a82ee
+SIZE (lordsawar-0.1.0.tar.gz) = 13572734
Index: games/lordsawar/pkg-plist
@@ -3,6 +3,8 @@
 bin/lordsawar-editor
 bin/lordsawar-tile-editor
 share/applications/lordsawar.desktop
+share/gnome/help/lordsawar/C/legal.xml
+share/gnome/help/lordsawar/C/lordsawar.xml
 %%DATADIR%%/citynames
 %%DATADIR%%/heronames
 %%DATADIR%%/ruinnames
@@ -121,7 +123,7 @@
 %%DATADIR%%/various/buttons.png
 %%DATADIR%%/various/city_occupied.png
 %%DATADIR%%/various/items.png
-%%DATADIR%%/various/medals_mask.gif
+%%DATADIR%%/various/medals_mask.png
 %%DATADIR%%/various/ship.png
 %%DATADIR%%/various/recruit_female.png
 %%DATADIR%%/various/recruit_male.png
@@ -151,9 +153,7 @@
 %%DATADIR%%/map/2ndPunic37.map
 %%DATADIR%%/music/back1.ogg
 %%DATADIR%%/music/defeat.ogg
-%%DATADIR%%/music/defeat1.ogg
 %%DATADIR%%/music/victory.ogg
-%%DATADIR%%/music/victory1.ogg
 %%DATADIR%%/music/hero.ogg
 %%DATADIR%%/music/intro.ogg
 %%DATADIR%%/music/music.xml
@@ -286,6 +286,10 @@
 %%DATADIR%%/citysets/bigdefault/temples.png
 %%DATADIR%%/citysets/bigdefault/towers.png
 @dirrmtry share/applications
+@dirrm share/gnome/help/lordsawar/C
+@dirrm share/gnome/help/lordsawar
+@dirrmtry share/gnome/help
+@dirrmtry share/gnome
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/army/default
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/army/bigdefault
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/army
Index: games/lordsawar/Makefile
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@

 PORTNAME=	lordsawar
-PORTVERSION=	0.0.9
+PORTVERSION=	0.1.0
